text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm shopping at the mall when I see<n>Admire
Vega consoling a crying boy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, what happ—

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's what I'd like to know.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaah! I'm scared!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
He's been like this for a while now.<n>I've tried
talking to him, but he won't<n>stop crying.
choice_data_list: Let's try getting him to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? I said I've already tried<n>everyth—
choice_data_list:
Can you fetch someone from the information
kiosk? I'll stay with the boy.

Can you fetch someone from the information
kiosk? I'll stay with the boy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In just a few minutes, we<n>successfully get the
mall staff to make<n>an announcement over the PA<n>
system.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Big siiis! I was so scared!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
And I told you not to go off on your<n>own! You'd
better not let go of my<n>hand this time!
choice_data_list: I'm glad we found his family.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Me too.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the boy evidently in a state of<n>panic from
being lost, we pat him on<n>the back and try our
best to reassure<n>him.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Sniffle. My sister... I don't knowwhere she is.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm sure your sister is<n>also looking
for you. Where did you<n>two get separated?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, after we get enough<n>information from the
boy...

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Bye bye!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.
